# fhhs-skills pi adapters

These wrappers let pi load the existing Claude-oriented skills from `.claude/skills/`.
Keep `.pi/` and `.claude/` directories adjacent (these adapters reference `../../../.claude/skills/...`).
Use the pi command in the left column.

| pi command | Original Claude command | Source file |
|---|---|---|
| `/skill:fh-auto` | `/fh:auto` | `.claude/skills/auto/SKILL.md` |
| `/skill:fh-build` | `/fh:build` | `.claude/skills/build/SKILL.md` |
| `/skill:fh-fix` | `/fh:fix` | `.claude/skills/fix/SKILL.md` |
| `/skill:fh-health` | `/fh:health` | `.claude/skills/health/SKILL.md` |
| `/skill:fh-help` | `/fh:help` | `.claude/skills/help/SKILL.md` |
| `/skill:fh-learnings` | `/fh:learnings` | `.claude/skills/learnings/SKILL.md` |
| `/skill:fh-map-codebase` | `/fh:map-codebase` | `.claude/skills/map-codebase/SKILL.md` |
| `/skill:fh-new-project` | `/fh:new-project` | `.claude/skills/new-project/SKILL.md` |

| `/skill:fh-settings` | `/fh:settings` | `.claude/skills/settings/SKILL.md` |
